follow_ups.title: Repeat segment budget benchmark with natural long speech
follow_ups.reason: This feature used controlled silence/repetition cases to isolate compute factors; product thresholds need natural long-speech repeat runs.

follow_ups.title: Implement hybrid long-dictation segment budget controller
follow_ups.reason: Pilot evidence favors hard audio-duration limits plus soft text-length limits and boundary-aware cuts, but App runtime behavior is outside this measurement feature.
